rationale: The citing paper uses Stremersch et al. (2003) in its core conceptual framing rather than only in a generic citation list. It is cited to support the claim that prior tie research has focused on more peripheral outsourcing contexts, which helps motivate the citing paper's research gap in NPD outsourcing. It is also used to anchor the definition of technological uncertainty, a central construct in the citing paper's hypotheses. The citation is therefore conceptually important, even though the citing study does not directly reuse the cited study's data or method.
relation_description: The citing paper treats Stremersch et al. (2003) as prior conceptual groundwork for outsourcing governance under uncertainty, using it to position its contribution and define a key uncertainty construct. It builds its own NPD outsourcing performance framework on that broader foundation.
